race.description: Lavish By P & Co Mdn Plate
race.comment: GALACTIC GIRL (5) turned in a nice run last time to finish third over 1200m at Sandown-Lakeside, improving on an even effort fresh at Echuca. Finds a nice race now third up and will take beating. KADESH (7) is resuming from a spell of five months and having her first run for the Cindy Alderson yard, formerly with the Hayes. She showed ability in her maiden campaign and can run a bold race fresh. MIGHTY MYSTIC (1) settled back on debut last time out but wound up strongly in the run home to finish third over 1217m at this track. Better for that experience and will be charging late again. PROFFER (2) resumes for his second campaign and can be an improver this time around.
